title: OnPolitics: How will Trump play offense and defense against Harris?
shortDescription: Donald Trump may want to stay on the attack against newly minted opponent Kamala Harris – but he will also have to play plenty of defense too.

title: Netanyahu calls out Democratic critics and protesters in speech to Congress
shortDescription: Israel Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu spoke to a divided Congress as his support among some Democrats falters.

title: FBI director details about Trump shooter logistics
shortDescription: FBI director Christopher Wray gave a detailed account about Donald Trump's shooter during a Congressional hearing.

title: Liz Cheney didn't make post calling Trump and Biden names | Fact check
shortDescription: The fabricated image shows telltale clues that the post is false, such as a misspelling. The earliest version includes a parody label at the bottom.

title: Biden says he feels 'well' in first post-campaign appearance
shortDescription: Biden says he feels "well" in his first public appearance since dropping out of the 2024 presidential race.

title: Fact checks: Debunking falsehoods about Biden exit, Harris campaign
shortDescription: Biden's decision to leave the race and endorse Vice President Kamala Harris as the Democratic nominee led to misinformation spreading widely online.

title: ATV driver found dead after allegedly running over man putting up Trump sign
shortDescription: Police in Hancock, Michigan responded to three separate incidents they suspect were politically motivated

title: Trump gunman searched JFK assassin, flew drone over rally area: FBI
shortDescription: FBI Director Christopher Wray revealed the gunman who shot Donald Trump did research on John Kennedy's assassin and flew a drone over the rally area.

title: Police deploy pepper spray as Netanyahu protesters converge on Capitol
shortDescription: Multiple demonstrations were taking place in DC against Netanyahu, who was in the US to address Congress.

title: Biden to give national address Wednesday night: Here's how to watch
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is set to deliver a national address Wednesday night from the Oval Office after dropping out of the 2024 presidential race.

title: Dozens of Democrats are skipping Netanyahu’s address to Congress
shortDescription: Multiple Democrats said it is inappropriate for Netanyahu to speak to a joint session Wednesday.

title: Trump wants to attack Harris – but he'll also have to defend himself
shortDescription: Donald Trump's vulnerabilities include a criminal conviction, his age and more as he faces off against Kamala Harris.

title: Trump shooter motive doesn't look partisan so far, despite GOP claims
shortDescription: Republicans like JD Vance said Thomas Crooks was inspired by Joe Biden to shoot Donald Trump, but evidence so far shows no partisan motive.

title: How Georgia's SB 189 cleared the way for mass voter challenges
shortDescription: Voter challenges, once an obscure practice, have become a mass movement in Georgia. Experts say a new election law will likely make the problem worse.
